---
title: "Data Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

*You can include a dahsboard of your core data. You can use various graphics tools like `ggplot` or `plotly` to create dashboard visuals. Follow the instructions [Quarto: Dashboards](https://quarto.org/docs/dashboards/). Under [Using Dashboards](https://quarto.org/docs/dashboards/layout.html) you find how to structure the dashboard and how to include data displays.* 

## Row


## Row
